text:
The garden is blooming! 🌸✨ We just merged 20 updates and things are looking lush.

First up: BYOP is now POLLEN! 🐝🍯 Earn badges, get credits, keep building. It’s a whole new vibe for our ecosystem.

Creatives, we see you! 👀 New tools for video consistency, character design, and a literal Sticker Garden (so cute). Plus, a bunch of new dev tools to keep your workflows smooth.

Open source, open hearts. Come build with us! 💻🌱

Link in bio to see the full changelog!

#pollinations #opensource #aiart #pixelart #indiedev #cozyvibes #generativeai #buildinpublic #8bit #retrogaming
